mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fe_assessment_categories WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fe_assessment_categories WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM fe_assessment_categories WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE fe_assessment_categories
category_name = #{categoryName},
category_description = #{categoryDescription},
score = #{score},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
